description: Read data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json and present the content plan to the operator in a clear, scannable format. Show each post slot with: scheduled time, category, post text, hashtags, and image prompt summary. Also show reply templates. Then generate HTML report using: python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py generic data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json --title 'EN Content Plan 2026-03-12'. Send via: python3 scripts/telegram_send.py --document <html_path> 'EN Content Plan — 2026-03-12'
notes: Operator wants to review today's EN content plan before approving posts. Present all post drafts clearly.
